flowchart TB "CI/CD Pipeline"
  A([Dev Push]) --> B[Lint]
  B --> C[Unit Tests]
  C --> D{CI Passes?}
  D -->|no| E[Notify Author]
  E --> A
  D -->|yes| F[Build Image]
  F --> G[Deploy Staging]
  G --> H{Stage OK?}
  H -->|no| I[Rollback Staging]
  I --> E
  H -->|yes| J[Deploy Prod]
  J --> K{Canary OK?}
  K -->|no| L[Rollback Prod]
  L --> E
  K -->|yes| M([Released])
